title: JamBot task.json (canonical v0.1.4 — notification_policy + two-phase schedule)
description: v0.1.3 (failure_modes enum locked) + notification_policy field (default mode 'roll_up_daily') + research_at sibling of scheduled_at for two-phase scheduling. Both additions are additive — v0.1.3 records without these fields validate clean under v0.1.4. Milestone-4 per host msg 2026-05-19-001.

raised_by.description: Intake channel. 'email' added per Rule 7 (folded into Rule 8 amendment).

source_ref.description: Mesh filename / transcript line / sms-sid / gmail-thread-id.

operator_phone.description: Only SMS-origin tasks populate. bun-desktop wanted this cut; src-desktop wanted it kept — resolution: keep but nullable.

email_authorized_by_mike.description: Rule 1: must be set together with `recipient`.

recipient.description: Rule 1: must be set together with `email_authorized_by_mike`.

research_at.description: Two-phase schedule (milestone-4): moment the planning/research run fires. Sibling of scheduled_at. Optional; defaults to scheduled_at - 60min when null and scheduled_at is set (resolved scheduler-side, not schema-side). v0.1.3 readers that ignore this field continue to validate.

state_history.description: Append-only audit trail (bun-desktop). Can be empty but must be present.

lock_required.description: src-desktop: false for background tasks (digest cron, blocker sweeps); default true.

failure_modes.description: v0.2 enum locked 2026-05-18T21:05Z by src-desktop@mesh. Empty list legal; non-empty must be drawn from the 21-value enum. Source: /mesh/BLACKBOARD/task-system/2026-05-19/failure-modes-enum-v0.2.md

dedup_hash.description: Rule 8 (host@mesh confirmed 2026-05-18). Populated by intake adapter from tenant+source_ref+summary-shingle. Required-always.

recipient_role.description: Rule 7 (host@mesh confirmed 2026-05-18). Outbound-writer gate — disambiguates mike vs operator vs client. Required-always.

linked_to.description: Rule 8 (host@mesh confirmed 2026-05-18). Task-ids this dedupes with; default []. Required-always.

notification_policy.description: Milestone-4 (host msg 2026-05-19-001). Delivery cadence for task-completion notifications. OPTIONAL — absent = treat as {"mode": "roll_up_daily"}. Snake_case enum values are stable for future migrations.

mode.description: inline = reply at done; roll_up_daily = batch into morning brief (DEFAULT); on_finding = fire only when a research delta crosses on_finding_threshold.

on_finding_threshold.description: TBD shape pending Mike-input. Proposed: {metric: str, comparator: enum, value: number, cooldown_seconds: int}. Only meaningful when mode='on_finding'; null elsewhere. Validator accepts any object until v0.2 ratchet (mirrors failure_modes v0.1->0.2 path).

allOf.description: Rule 1 cross-field: email_authorized_by_mike and recipient must BOTH be set or BOTH be null.
scheduled / today / done states must carry scheduled_at.
done state must carry completed_at and outcome.
